meaning: adj.错误的,虚伪的,假的,无信义的,伪造的,人工的,不老实的adv.欺诈地
examples: The thief used a false identity.
The whole argument rests on a false assumption.
He hid behind a false identity.
The 10-room museum contains gold-handled pistols with jewel inlays and cars with false compartments.
This false sense of security manifests itself in dangerous ways when it comes to running a business.
